finding: ATM has docs/ERROR_CODES.md generated from source occurrences and docs/cli-error-policy.md for envelope policy, but the global error-code surface is not yet a curated knowledge base with canonical category, human description, remediation, retryability, approval requirements, and related recovery commands for every user-visible ATM_* code.
expectedBehavior: Every user-visible ATM error code should resolve to one canonical registry entry that includes stable meaning, severity/category, short operator-facing explanation, required command or recovery action, retryability, and links to the owning validator or runbook. Skills and CLI help should reference the same registry instead of duplicating partial prose.
evidenceOrRepro: docs/ERROR_CODES.md currently lists code, source location, and raw context only; Team Agents has a separate local canonical-code table in docs/governance/team-agents/team-plan-vocabulary-and-roster-drift.md, showing the registry is fragmented by surface.
followUp: Keep exact curated entries for high-impact recurring codes; prefixRules now provide canonical fallback guidance for every source-scanned ATM_* family, and resolver skills read exact entries before prefix fallbacks.
